# daytona_volume (Resource)

Manages a Daytona persistent volume.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "daytona_volume" "example" {
  name = "example-volume"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Volume name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Volume creation timestamp.
- `error_reason` (String) Volume error reason, when available.
- `id` (String) Daytona volume ID.
- `last_used_at` (String) Volume last-used timestamp, when available.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID that owns the volume.
- `state` (String) Current volume state.
- `updated_at` (String) Volume update timestamp.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import daytona_volume.example "volume-id"
```
